case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. GINA GALARCE

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT FILED AN ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT. (SEE CAL. CODE CIV. PROC. 438(F)(1).) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALARCE, GINA $1,362.74 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,646.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GALARCE, GINA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-15-2014

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 10, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 7, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Denied. Defendant has not filed an answer to the complaint. (See Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 438(f)(1).) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to December 10, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 7, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)s
